programme.title: Crocodile 2: Death Swamp
programme.desc: A plane crashes in a remote swamp area, and the survivors must battle a gigantic crocodile to survive.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Vampires vamp it up in this hilarious mock-doc. Viago, Deacon and Vladislav are vampires who are finding that modern life has them struggling with the mundane - like paying rent, keeping up with the chore wheel, trying to get into nightclubs and overcoming flatmate conflicts.

programme.title: Gorgo
programme.desc: The classic sci-fi story of a captured baby prehistoric monster put on display in London, with giant momma monster coming to the rescue!

programme.title: Meet My Valentine
programme.desc: After finding out he has only months to live, Tom sets out to make sure that his wife and 8 year old daughter are taken care of after he is gone.

programme.title: Mothers Of The Bride
programme.desc: Jenna is getting married, her mother is delighted until Jenna announces she wants to find her birth mother.

programme.title: Zulu (1964)
programme.desc: Outnumbered British soldiers do battle with Zulu warriors at Rorke's Drift.

programme.title: Zulu Dawn
programme.desc: In 1879 South Africa, British Cape Colony administrators seek to crush the Zulus, viewing them as an obstacle to their colonial ambitions. To provoke war, they issue King Cetshwayo an impossible ultimatum, confident their rifles and artillery will ensure an easy victory. But as Lord Chelmsford’s forces chase an unseen foe, they discover near Isandlwana how gravely they’ve underestimated the Zulu nation’s skill and strength.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E25 - Kate The Making Of A Modern Queen
programme.desc: A look at the Duchess of Cambridge's journey from being an everyday young woman to becoming a future queen, and what her evolution signifies for the royal family.

programme.title: Amish Abduction
programme.desc: Amish wife and mother Annie faces a crisis when her husband leaves the word of the Amish to live among normal Americans, or the English as the Amish dub them. But things turn even more dire when her husband returns, seeking custody of their son, and is willing to kill to achieve his goal…

programme.title: Killer in Suburbia
programme.desc: Gina and her teenage daughter Kelsey move into a new town so Kelsey can attend a better high school. It’s the start of senior year - meaning new parties to attend and new friends to make. But when Kelsey is abducted while on a date, all Gina’s nightmares come true. Can she save her daughter in time? And can she really trust the people trying to help?

programme.title: 4 Wedding Planners
programme.desc: After Lily rejects her boyfriend's marriage proposal, she returns home to Hawaii where she must help out with her mother's wedding planning business.

programme.title: Sirens
programme.desc: When a painting is termed blasphemous, a young minister and his wife visit the artist... and the three sexually playful models living with him.

programme.title: I.T.
programme.desc: Firing his I.T. consultant, Ed, proves disastrous for self-made millionaire Mike Regan. He soon finds himself in a deadly game of cat and mouse when Ed decides to stalk his daughter and endangers his family and business.

programme.title: Bonds will be Broken
programme.desc: When her sister Nina is seduced by a mysterious self-improvement cult, Anna decides to go undercover at the cult's annual retreat to save her sister from the sinister cult leader.
